Printing Products

Four core print products, organized into one clean ordering flow.

DELTA T focuses on sticker, label, name card and menu printing — helping customers submit clear details before quotation and production.

From product choice to quote-ready print details.

Instead of a basic contact form, DELTA T helps structure each order with product type, size, quantity, finishing, artwork and customer contact information.

AI-Assisted Print Order Request

Request sticker, label, name card and menu printing faster.

Customers can submit clear print details, quantity, finishing, artwork status and contact information before quotation.

Printing workflow

What happens after submission?

Submit request

Customer sends product, size, quantity and artwork details.

AI organize

DELTA T prepares the request into a clearer quote structure.

Print review

The team checks printing requirements before confirmation.

Confirm & deliver

Final details are confirmed before printing, packing and delivery.

Designed for business printing orders

This form is structured for sticker, label, name card and menu quotation, not unrelated product categories.

Talk to sales
Printing Workflow

A cleaner way to handle business printing orders.

From customer request to quote preparation and delivery, DELTA T MANUFACTURING SDN. BHD. gives every Sticker, Label, Name Card and Menu order a structured workflow.

STEP 01

Submit Details

Customer chooses Sticker, Label, Name Card or Menu.

STEP 02

AI Organize

Order details are arranged into a clearer quote request.

STEP 03

Quote Confirm

Team confirms price, timeline and print requirements.

STEP 04

Print Prepare

Artwork, size, quantity and finishing are checked.

STEP 05

Pack & Deliver

Finished print items are packed and delivered.

Built for Sticker · Label · Name Card · Menu orders

This process prepares the future system for WhatsApp enquiry, quotation, database, admin dashboard and order tracking.

Contact DELTA T MANUFACTURING SDN. BHD.

Send your print details. We prepare the quote.

Share your Sticker, Label, Name Card or Menu requirement with size, quantity, finishing and artwork details. Our team will review it manually and prepare a quotation.
